title: Backups
scope: Database + project-files backup runner. Two independently configurable destinations — a local/network filesystem path and Google Drive (service account with domain-wide delegation) — each with its own enable/disable toggle. Runs backups and tracks their status/history. NOT a restore/migration tool; Backups produces and tracks backup artifacts.

specs.title: Configure destinations
specs.behavior: Configuration sets up the two backup destinations (local/network path and Google Drive), each independently enabled or disabled.

specs.title: Run a backup
specs.behavior: Running performs a database + project-files backup to each enabled destination.

specs.title: Backup status & history
specs.behavior: Status returns recent backup runs and their outcomes per destination.
